mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_BASIC ( USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, EMAIL, PHONE_NO, PASSWORD, NAME, GENDER_CODE, BIRTH_DATE, USER_STATUS, INSERT_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{loginId}, #{email}, #{phoneNo}, #{password}, #{name}, #{genderCode}, #{birthDate}, #{userStatus}, #{insertUserId} )

INSERT INTO USER_DETAIL ( USER_ID, FRIEND_MESSAGE_AVAIL_YN, HOMPI_USE_YN, CONFIRM_YN_1, CONFIRM_YN_2, CONFIRM_YN_3, INSERT_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{friendMessageAvailYN}, #{hompiUseYN}, #{confirmYN1}, #{confirmYN2}, #{confirmYN3}, #{insertUserId} )

INSERT INTO MINIMI_BASIC ( MINIMI_ID, PRODUCT_ID, USER_ID, FACE_DIRECTION_CODE, X_POSITION, Y_POSITION, Z_POSITION, MAIN_YN, USE_YN, INSERT_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{minimiId}, #{productId}, #{userId}, #{faceDirectionCode}, #{xPosition}, #{yPosition}, #{zPosition}, #{mainYN}, #{useYN}, #{insertUserId} )
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM USER_BASIC WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM USER_BASIC WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM USER_BASIC WHERE PHONE_NO = #{phoneNo}
